headlines.title: Dow Jones Top Markets Headlines at 1 PM ET: U.S. Stocks Mixed as SpaceX Overtakes Amazon in Market Value [2.2.1]
Oil drops below US$80 per barrel, while tech stocks weigh on a mixed Wall Street
Morgan Stanley lowers Brent oil price forecasts after US-Iran peace deal
Stock market today: Nikkei tops 70K before Japan rate hike
Nasdaq 100 Falls 2% as Chipmakers Halt Solid Run: Markets Wrap

notes: S&P 500 fell 42.94 points (-0.57%) to close at 7511.35 on June 16, 2026, snapping a three-day winning streak [1.1.2].
NASDAQ Composite dropped 1.15% to 26376.34 on chipmaker weakness and profit-taking.
The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.64% to hit another record high as investors rotated into industrial and financial sectors.
Brent crude slipped below $80 per barrel to settle at $78.96 on optimism surrounding a tentative U.S.-Iran peace deal.
The Federal Reserve began its first meeting under new Chair Kevin Warsh.
